labeling: Label = INITIAL grill verdict of the archived report (re-grills never flip a label). PASS/APPROVE/ACCEPT = pass; BLOCK/REJECT/FAIL/MERGE-BLOCKED = fail; conditional verdicts, blocked-harness stubs, and planning-only reports are excluded. See t1-judge-rubric.md.
